title: More Rail Variants (MStV+)
description: All Rail Blocks for every kind of wood - A 'More Stick Variants' Add-On
body: [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/badge/requires-mstv.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Rail-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Rail Variants Tired of seeing the same old tracks again and again? Spice up your ~~train~~.. Minecart travel experience with rails of all the colors that the woods provide. Including all three variants: Activator, Detector and Powered Rail. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/w6q77.png) A mineshaft with a lot of rail and many different wood types. (Using fitting torches from [More Torch Variants (MStV+)](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants).) ## Adding 44 new Rail variants (11 for each of the four types) to Minecraft. ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: Recommended Quad version: [1.3.0-beta.5 for 1.21(.1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad/version/1.3.0-beta.5+1.21-Fabric) ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/tw8u8.gif) Looking at a tunnel in a Mesa Mineshaft: We can see that instead of regular _Oak Rail_ and _Oak Torches_, the game now generates the mineshaft with _**Dark Oak Rail**_ and _**Dark Oak Torches**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)). ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/0w5xp.gif)**]()
